nasb.text: So when they had come together, they were asking Him, saying, “Lord, is it at this time You are restoring the kingdom to Israel?”

esv.text: So when they had come together, they asked him, “Lord, will you at this time restore the kingdom to Israel?”

cnv.text: 他們聚集的時候，問耶穌說：“主啊，你要在這時候使以色列復國嗎？”

ccb.text: 他们跟耶稣在一起的时候问祂：“主啊，你要在这时候复兴以色列国吗？”

csbs.text: 于是聚集的时候，他们就问耶稣说：“主啊！你复兴以色列国，是否在这时候呢？”
